projectDescription: AI-powered online exam proctoring platform that lets teachers create monitored assessments and review integrity reports — no student account required.
keyFeatures: Browser-based proctoring with webcam, screen share, tab, and audio monitoring
AI-generated integrity reports with trust ratings (High/Medium/Low) via Claude
Token-gated student links — no student account required
Live exam dashboard with broadcast messaging and mass controls
Supports Google Forms, PDF, Excel, and Word exam formats
Grade upload and cross-referencing with integrity data
Flexible plans: Free, Classroom, and School tiers
publicApiSurface: POST /api/sessions/create — start a student exam session
POST /api/flags/batch — submit monitoring flags during an exam
POST /api/tests/create — create a new proctored test
GET  /api/tests/[id]/poll — live report polling for teacher dashboard
POST /api/tests/[id]/broadcast — send message to students during exam
POST /api/tests/[id]/mass-screenshot — trigger snapshots across all sessions
POST /api/tests/[id]/upload-grades — upload Google Forms CSV for grade matching
POST /api/reports/generate — generate AI integrity summary for a session
POST /api/flags/[id]/decision — confirm or dismiss a flag
